title: Portal to access available forms?
excerpt:
Hi there, 
We are currently enjoying forms and the ease of use. The problem we are having is that there isn’t a location that our staff and students can access to see all available forms. I send out emails with links, bu…

posts.author: Adrian (Adrian F. Guzman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

We are currently enjoying forms and the ease of use. The problem we are having is that there isn’t a location that our staff and students can access to see all available forms. I send out emails with links, but those emails get lost right away. Can I suggest a feature in which there is a location anyone can access and fill out a form?

posts.author: PedroM (Pedro Malaga - monday.com Certified Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Adrian,
I don’t know if this will solve your need, but in the meantime you could create a board to gather all the forms. You can order it using the groups, items and subitems, and use one text or link column for the form.
You can even add other columns to classify the form or add more information about it.
Hope it helps,

posts.author: reclaim (Susie )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Adrian did you ever find a solution to this problem? We have the same issue and I can’t create a board to gather all the forms unfortunately as @PedroM suggested - it doesn’t work for the function we need.
Can I embed the form somewhere somehow, for access at all times, outside of the board it is in Monday?
Thanks - really hope someone has an answer for this!!
